summary_tables.title: Mining Robustness Study
summary_tables.description: Prompt-Anchered Ego-Noise Mining is evaluated under four environment-plus-ego SNR sampling conditions. Higher values are better.
summary_tables.note: Values show mean clustering accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 over five mining runs; labels are used only for evaluation.
